svg.text: Stack — LIFO Bookkeeping for Nested Structure
• Matched-pair / bracket validation — push openers, pop on closer
• Expression evaluation — operator precedence with two stacks
• Iterative DFS — replace recursion with explicit stack
• "Process the most recent thing first" signal phrase
Operations: push, pop, peek — all O(1).
For each character c in s:
if c is opener: push c
if c is closer: stack must be non-empty AND top must be the matching opener; pop
After scan, stack must be empty.
Mismatch on push, pop, or final-empty check ⟹ invalid.
If you see "most recent", "balanced", or "nested", the stack is the structure.
